caption: A man with a beard and a shaved head wears black headphones and a plain white t-shirt while sitting in a studio with dark grey acoustic foam walls. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone attached to a boom arm, which bears the white text "Rode" and "PodMic". In the initial sequence, the man looks to his left and gestures with his right hand raised in the air. He then shifts his gaze forward, bringing his right hand up to touch the side of his headphones. Continuing the movement, he looks slightly to the left again while holding his hand near his shoulder. Finally, he looks straight ahead and gestures once more with his right hand raised beside his head. His expression remains focused as he speaks into the microphone throughout the sequence.
